common.password_description: The password of your my-PV device. When no custom password is set you have to use the **devicekey** which can be found under the ⓘ info menu of your my-PV device. For the HEA•THOR IoT you can find the **devicekey** on the device label.
common.token_description: To generate a my-PV Cloud API Access Token go to your [my-PV Cloud]({cloud_url}) and navigate to ⚙️ > **Device Setup**. Enable **Advanced Settings**, navigate to **API** and **Generate API Access Token**. Use this when setting up the my-PV integration.

error.invalid_cloud_api_token: Invalid my-PV Cloud API Access Token
error.invalid_serial_number_or_cloud_api_token: Invalid serial number or my-PV Cloud API Access Token

discovery_confirm.description: Do you want to set up {name}?
discovery_confirm.title: {name}

reauth_cloud.description: The my-PV integration needs to re-authenticate with your my-PV Cloud.
reauth_cloud.title: Authentication expired for {name}

reauth_local.description: The my-PV integration needs to re-authenticate with your my-PV device.
reauth_local.title: Authentication expired for {name}

data_description.serial_number: You can find the serial number on the device label.

user.description: If your my-PV device is connected to your local network the **Local** method is the preferred method to connect.
user.title: Select connection method
